#nullable enable

namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.OrderDto ToDto(global::Demo.Order o)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(o);
        return new global::Demo.OrderDto
        {
            Id = o.Id,
            Name = o.Name,
        };
    }
    public partial global::Demo.Order FromDto(global::Demo.OrderDto d)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(d);
        return new global::Demo.Order
        {
            Id = d.Id,
            Name = d.Name,
        };
    }

    public void VerifyRoundTrip_ToDto(int seed = 12345, int iterations = 100)
        => global::DwarfMapper.Testing.RoundTrip.Verify<global::Demo.Order, global::Demo.OrderDto>(ToDto, FromDto, seed, iterations);
}
